ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, all fields legible. Original certificate issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce / ICC.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, 3 pages, all fields legible. Invoice issued by Vitrolife Sweden AB.

document_pairing.method: Certificate references invoice number 2510582, which matches invoice's 'Our order no: 2510582'. Consignor matches invoice issuer.

locations_found: Invoice page 1 footer: 'Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 400 92 Göteborg, SWEDEN'
Invoice page 2 footer: 'Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 400 92 Göteborg, SWEDEN'
Invoice page 3 footer: 'Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 400 92 Göteborg, SWEDEN'
Invoice page 3 stamp area: 'Vitrolife Sweden AB'

candidates.normalized_text: cumhuriyet cad. no: 131/2 üsküdar, mr. engin gedik, 34725 istanbul, türkiye

candidates.normalized_text: vitrolife sweden ab, box 9080, 400 92 göteborg, sweden

candidates.normalized_text: sismedikal san. tic. ltd. sti., cumhuriyet cad. no: 131/2 üsküdar, tr-34725 istanbul, turkey

candidates.normalized_text: sismedikal san. tic. ltd. sti., cinnah cad. gelibolu sok. no: 3/7, kavaklidere, tr-06690 ankara, turkey

candidates.normalized_text: components for culturing media & medical instruments for in vitro fertilisation ivf - sterile saline solutions - store at +2 to +8 degrees c

consignor.certificate_value: Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 42132, Göteborg, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 400 92 Göteborg, SWEDEN (footer on all pages)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice pages
comparison_steps.details: Consignor name 'Vitrolife Sweden AB' found explicitly in invoice footer on all 3 pages: 'Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 400 92 Göteborg, SWEDEN'. Also found in invoice header as 'Vitrolife' brand/logo and in page 3 stamp area as 'Vitrolife Sweden AB'. Name matches exactly after normalization.
Certificate: Sweden. Invoice footer: SWEDEN. VAT prefix SE confirms Sweden (rule 4.1.2.1). Exact match after normalization.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice footer and header
Landkontroll – Sweden matches SWEDEN after normalization
Indirect land verification via VAT prefix SE

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Vitrolife Sweden AB' in certificate is found explicitly in invoice footer on all pages as 'Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 400 92 Göteborg, SWEDEN'. Country Sweden verified via explicit address and VAT prefix SE. Direct and unambiguous match.
consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 42132, Göteborg, Sweden'. Invoice footer: 'Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 400 92 Göteborg, SWEDEN'. Company name is identical. Country is Sweden in both. Postal code differs slightly (42132 vs 400 92) but per rule 4.1.5, address differences do not cause MISMATCH when name and country match. Rule 4.1.0 provides direct match via explicit presence in invoice.

consignee.certificate_value: SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti., Cumhuriyet Cad. No: 131/2 Üsküdar, Mr. Engin Gedik, 34725 Istanbul, Türkiye
consignee.invoice_value: Invoice address: SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti., Cinnah Cad. Gelibolu Sok. No: 3/7, Kavaklidere, TR-06690 Ankara, Turkey. Delivery address: SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti., Cumhuriyet Cad. No: 131/2 Üsküdar, TR-34725 Istanbul, Turkey

comparison_steps.details: Invoice has 'Invoice address' field with SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti., Cinnah Cad. Gelibolu Sok. No: 3/7, Kavaklidere, TR-06690 Ankara, Turkey. This is the primary facturation field.

comparison_steps.description: Compare consignee name in certificate with invoice address name
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti.' Invoice address: 'SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti.' Names are identical after normalization.
Certificate: Türkiye. Invoice address: Turkey. Türkiye and Turkey are the same country (Türkiye is the official name of Turkey). Match after normalization.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate address (Üsküdar/Istanbul) differs from invoice address (Ankara) but matches delivery address (Istanbul/Üsküdar)
comparison_steps.details: Per rule 4.2.4, differences in street address or postal code do NOT cause MISMATCH. Company name and country are decisive. Both match.

rules_applied.description: Invoice address (Invoice to) is primary facturation field – SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti.
Consignee name matches invoice address name exactly
Address differences (Istanbul vs Ankara) do not cause MISMATCH when name and country match

consignee.motivation: Consignee 'SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti.' in certificate matches exactly the name in invoice's 'Invoice address' field. Country Türkiye = Turkey after normalization. The street address differs (certificate shows Üsküdar/Istanbul, invoice address shows Ankara) but per rule 4.2.4 address differences do not cause MISMATCH when company name and country are verified.
consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti.' with address in Istanbul, Türkiye. Invoice has two address blocks: 'Invoice address' with SISMEDIKAL in Ankara, Turkey and 'Delivery address' with SISMEDIKAL in Istanbul, Turkey. Per 4.2.0.2, Invoice address is the primary field. Company name is identical in both certificate and invoice address. Country: Türkiye = Turkey. Per 4.2.4, street address differences are explicitly NOT grounds for MISMATCH. Result: MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value: Components for Culturing Media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF), See attached invoice 2510582 dated 20250805
goods_description.invoice_value: Invoice 2510582, Shipping date 20250805, with description: 'Componets for culturing media & medical instruments for In Vitro Fertilisation IVF - Sterile saline solutions'

comparison_steps.description: Certificate contains general goods description with explicit invoice reference
comparison_steps.details: Certificate states 'See attached invoice 2510582 dated 20250805'. Invoice number: 2510582 (found as '-2510582' in header and '2510582' in 'Our order no'). Invoice shipping date: 20250805. Both reference and date match exactly. The certificate's description 'Components for Culturing Media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF)' is consistent with invoice content (IVF media products). The expression 'See attached invoice' constitutes an explicit invoice reference per 4.3.5.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that invoice content is consistent with certificate description
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Components for Culturing Media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF)'. Invoice page 3 bottom: 'Componets for culturing media & medical instruments for In Vitro Fertilisation IVF'. Invoice line items include ASP, SpermGrad, SpermRinse, G-MOPS PLUS, HYASE-10X, ICSI, HSA-solution, OVOIL, G-IVF PLUS, G-1 PLUS, G-2 PLUS, EmbryoGlue — all IVF culturing media components. Content is fully consistent.

rules_applied.description: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens – certificate references invoice 2510582 dated 20250805 with 'See attached invoice'. Invoice number and date match. Content consistent.

goods_description.motivation: Certificate uses generell varubeskrivning 'Components for Culturing Media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF)' with explicit invoice reference 'See attached invoice 2510582 dated 20250805'. Invoice number 2510582 and shipping date 20250805 both match. Invoice content (IVF media products) is consistent with certificate description. Per rule 4.3.5, this constitutes a verified goods description.
goods_description.debug_explanation: Applying Priority 3 (4.3.5): Certificate says 'See attached invoice 2510582 dated 20250805'. Invoice header shows invoice no -2510582, shipping date 20250805, and Our order no 2510582. The reference '2510582' matches. The date '20250805' matches the shipping date. The phrase 'See attached invoice' is an explicit invoice reference. Invoice content on page 3 summarizes 'Componets for culturing media & medical instruments for In Vitro Fertilisation IVF' which is fully consistent with certificate's 'Components for Culturing Media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF)'. No article numbers in certificate so Priority 1 not applicable. Result: MATCH via 4.3.5.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains 'Gross: 262,40 kg' — this is the primary verification quantity
comparison_steps.details: Certificate Box 7: 'Gross: 262,40 kg'. This is the verifieringsgrundande kvantitet per rule 4.4.2.1.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 262.40 kg gross weight in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 262,40 kg Gross. Invoice: 'Gross weight (kg): 262,4'. After normalization: 262.40 vs 262.4. Applying allowed decimal truncation per 4.4.3: 262.40 truncated to one decimal = 262.4. Values match. Weight category: Certificate says 'Gross', invoice says 'Gross weight' — same category.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate Box 6 also states '12 cartons'. Invoice states 'Number of cartons: 12'.
comparison_steps.details: Both indicate 12 cartons. This is an additional match confirming the shipment.

comparison_steps.description: Check if invoice net weight contradicts certificate
comparison_steps.details: Invoice also states 'Net weight (kg): 159,2'. Certificate does NOT state a net weight value, only gross. Per 4.4.3.1, no contradiction exists because the certificate does not make a claim about NW.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value (Gross: 262,40 kg) is the verifieringsgrundande kvantitet
Förekomstkontroll – 262.40 kg identified as 262.4 kg in invoice Gross weight field
Weight category Gross is explicitly stated in both documents

quantity.motivation: Certificate Box 7 states 'Gross: 262,40 kg'. Invoice states 'Gross weight (kg): 262,4'. After allowed decimal truncation (262.40 → 262.4), the values match. Weight category 'Gross' is explicitly confirmed in both documents. Additionally, '12 cartons' in certificate Box 6 matches 'Number of cartons: 12' in invoice. No contradictions found.
quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7: 'Gross: 262,40 kg'. Invoice: 'Gross weight (kg): 262,4'. Numerical comparison: 262.40 vs 262.4. Per allowed truncation rule in 4.4.3, truncating 262.40 to one decimal gives 262.4 — exact match. Weight category: Certificate explicitly says 'Gross', invoice explicitly says 'Gross weight' — same. Unit: Certificate says 'kg', invoice header says '(kg)' — same. Box 6 also states '12 cartons', matching invoice 'Number of cartons: 12'. Invoice also shows NW 159.2 kg but certificate does not claim NW, so no contradiction per 4.4.3.1. Result: MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice page 1 description section: 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. This is an explicit origin field.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'European Community'. Invoice states 'Sweden' as origin.
comparison_steps.details: Per rule 4.5.4.1, when certificate states 'European Community' (equivalent to EU), and invoice states an EU member state (Sweden is EU member, SE in EU-27), the origin is verified. Sweden is a current EU member state.
Per 4.5.4.2: 'If certificate states EU/European Union/European Community and invoice states a specific EU member state → verified.' Sweden is EU-27 member. MATCH.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 Check for non-EU origins in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Verify no non-EU origins in invoice that would contradict
comparison_steps.details: Invoice states only 'Country of Origin: Sweden' as a single unified origin for all goods. Sweden is EU member. No non-EU origins found.

rules_applied.description: EU-normalisering: Certificate 'European Community' verified against invoice 'Sweden' (EU member state)
EU ↔ member state: European Community in certificate, Sweden (EU member) in invoice → verified

country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate states 'European Community' as origin. Invoice explicitly states 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. Per rules 4.5.4.1 and 4.5.4.2, European Community/EU is verified when invoice states an EU member state. Sweden is an EU-27 member. No non-EU origins found in invoice. MATCH.
country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3: 'European Community'. Invoice description header: 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. Applying 4.5.4.2: certificate says 'European Community' (= EU), invoice says 'Sweden'. Sweden is EU member (EU-27, code SE). The rule explicitly states: 'If certificate states EU/European Union/European Community and invoice states a specific EU member state → verified.' This is a direct application. No other origins appear in the invoice. Result: MATCH.

evidence_records.raw_text: Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 400 92 Göteborg, SWEDEN
SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti., Cinnah Cad. Gelibolu Sok. No: 3/7, Kavaklidere, TR-06690 Ankara, Turkey
SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti., Cumhuriyet Cad. No: 131/2 Üsküdar, TR-34725 Istanbul, Turkey
Componets for culturing media & medical instruments for In Vitro Fertilisation IVF - Sterile saline solutions - Store at +2 to +8 degrees C

evidence_records.used_for: quantity verification - contradiction check (no contradiction found)

rule_evaluation_log.details: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. Certificate number SEG-25D-328803 does not constitute an LC reference.
Document A is certificate (COO), Document B is invoice. Certificate references invoice 2510582 matching invoice's order number. Single invoice in invoice file. Pairing unambiguous.
Criterion 1: invoice reference 2510582 matches. Criterion 2: consignor Vitrolife Sweden AB found in invoice. Criterion 3: consignee SISMEDIKAL found in invoice. All three criteria satisfied.
Vitrolife Sweden AB found explicitly in invoice footer on all pages and in stamp on page 3.
Sweden = SWEDEN after normalization. VAT prefix SE confirms.
Invoice address field identified as primary. SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti. found there.
SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti. matches exactly.
Certificate address is in Istanbul, invoice address is in Ankara. Per 4.2.4, address differences do not cause MISMATCH when name and country match.
Certificate: 'See attached invoice 2510582 dated 20250805'. Invoice: no 2510582, shipping date 20250805. Both match. Content consistent.
European Community in certificate, Sweden in invoice. Sweden is EU-27 member.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Invoice number mismatch due to leading dash '-2510582'
rejected_hypotheses.reason: The invoice header shows '-2510582' but 'Our order no' shows '2510582'. The leading dash appears to be a formatting artifact. The numeric value 2510582 matches the certificate's reference exactly.

Certificate shows Üsküdar/Istanbul address while invoice address shows Ankara. However, per rule 4.2.4, address differences do not cause MISMATCH when company name and country match. Both show SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti. in Turkey.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Postal code mismatch for consignor (42132 vs 400 92)
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Certificate shows '42132, Göteborg' while invoice footer shows 'Box 9080, 400 92 Göteborg'. Per rule 4.1.5, address differences do not cause MISMATCH for consignor when name and country match.
Certificate: 262,40 kg. Invoice: 262,4 kg. Per allowed decimal truncation rule in 4.4.3, truncation from 262.40 to 262.4 is permitted. Values are numerically identical.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Origin mismatch: European Community vs Sweden
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Per rules 4.5.4.1 and 4.5.4.2, European Community/EU is equivalent to any EU member state. Sweden is an EU-27 member. This is an explicit and allowed normalization.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Vitrolife Sweden AB i Sverige, mottagaren SISMEDIKAL i Turkiet, varubeskrivningen (IVF-komponenter med hänvisning till faktura 2510582), bruttovikt 262,4 kg och ursprung European Community/Sverige stämmer alla överens. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
non_blocking_notes: Invoice number has leading dash '-2510582' which appears to be formatting.
Consignee has different street address in certificate (Istanbul) vs invoice address (Ankara) — same company, different offices.
Consignor postal code differs slightly (42132 vs 400 92) — same box address.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.document_pair_summary: Certifikat SEG-25D-328803 (Original, utfärdat 2025-08-05 av West Sweden Chamber of Commerce) jämförs med kommersiell faktura 2510582 (utfärdad av Vitrolife Sweden AB, shipping date 2025-08-05).

sections.certificate_value: Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 42132, Göteborg, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 400 92 Göteborg, SWEDEN (fakturafot)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur 4.1.0: Consignor-namn hittat explicit i fakturans footer. Landkontroll 4.1.4: Sweden = SWEDEN.
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Vitrolife Sweden AB' förekommer explicit i fakturans sidfot på alla sidor. Land Sweden bekräftas via adress och VAT-prefix SE. Direkt och entydig matchning.

sections.certificate_value: SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti., Cumhuriyet Cad. No: 131/2 Üsküdar, 34725 Istanbul, Türkiye
sections.invoice_value: SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti., Cinnah Cad. Gelibolu Sok. No: 3/7, TR-06690 Ankara, Turkey (Invoice address)
sections.rule_applied: Prioritetsordning 4.2.0.2: Invoice address är primärt fält. Namnverifiering 4.2.2: Identiskt namn. Landkontroll 4.2.3: Türkiye = Turkey. Adressskillnad 4.2.4: Påverkar ej resultat.
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti.' matchar exakt mellan certifikat och fakturans faktureringsadress. Land Türkiye = Turkey efter normalisering. Skillnad i gatuadress (Istanbul vs Ankara) påverkar inte bedömningen.

sections.certificate_value: Components for Culturing Media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF), See attached invoice 2510582 dated 20250805
sections.invoice_value: Faktura 2510582, datum 20250805, innehåll: IVF-mediaprodukter (ASP, SpermGrad, SpermRinse, G-MOPS PLUS, HYASE-10X, etc.)
sections.rule_applied: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens 4.3.5: Certifikatet hänvisar till bifogad faktura med nummer och datum som matchar. Fakturans innehåll är förenligt med certifikatets beskrivning.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'See attached invoice 2510582 dated 20250805'. Fakturanummer 2510582 och datum 20250805 matchar exakt. Fakturans produkter (IVF-komponenter) är förenliga med certifikatets beskrivning 'Components for Culturing Media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF)'. Verifierat via regel 4.3.5.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll 4.4.1: Bruttovikt 262,40 kg identifierad som 262,4 kg i fakturan efter tillåten decimaltrunkering. Box 7 är verifieringsgrundande (4.4.2.1). Viktkategori Gross bekräftad i båda dokument.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets bruttovikt 262,40 kg matchar fakturans 262,4 kg efter tillåten decimaltrunkering. Viktkategori 'Gross' anges i båda dokumenten. Antal kartonger (12) matchar exakt. Ingen motsägelse med nettovikt (certifikatet anger ingen NW).

sections.rule_applied: EU-normalisering 4.5.4.1 och 4.5.4.2: European Community i certifikat verifierad mot Sweden (EU-medlemsstat) i faktura.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'European Community'. Fakturan anger 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. Sverige är EU-medlemsstat (EU-27). Per reglerna 4.5.4.1 och 4.5.4.2 är European Community/EU verifierat när fakturan anger en EU-medlemsstat. Inga icke-EU-ursprung förekommer i fakturan.

human_readable_report.conclusion: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Dokumentparet bedöms som IDENTICAL och är kvalificerat för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints MATCH with confidence >= 0.95. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW on any checkpoint. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL.
